name: Samsung Galaxy A55 5G (256GB)
description: The Samsung Galaxy A55 5G offers flagship-level features at a mid-range price. With an Exynos 1480 chip, 8GB RAM, and a stunning 120Hz Super AMOLED display, it's perfect for gaming and multitasking. We tracked the best price across Kenyan retailers and found the absolute lowest deal on Jumia today.

name: MacBook Air M3 (13-inch)
description: The brand new MacBook Air with the M3 chip brings unprecedented power to the world's most popular laptop. Perfect for professionals, creatives, and students in Kenya. Importing this via Amazon global shipping currently beats local retail pricing by over KSh 20,000.

name: Sony WH-1000XM5 ANC
description: Industry-leading noise cancellation meets premium comfort. The Sony WH-1000XM5 are the ultimate over-ear headphones for commuting in Nairobi or focusing in a busy office. Check out the current lowest price we've found online.

name: Philips Air Fryer XL (6.2L)
description: Cook healthy, crispy meals with up to 90% less fat. The Philips Air Fryer XL is the essential kitchen appliance for modern Kenyan homes. It's large enough to cook for the whole family. Grab this massive discount on Jumia while stock lasts.

name: EcoFlow Delta 2 Power Station
description: Never worry about blackouts again. This 1024Wh portable power station can run your fridge, laptop, and TV simultaneously. Fast charging from 0 to 80% in just 50 minutes. We found the best price on Kilimall today.

name: Magcubic HY300 4K Android Projector
description: The viral TikTok projector! This mini smart projector runs Android 11, has built-in Wi-Fi 6, and projects a massive 130-inch 4K screen onto your wall or ceiling. It is significantly cheaper to import via AliExpress than buying it locally in Nairobi.

name: Xiaomi Mi Band 8 Smart Watch
description: The undisputed king of budget fitness trackers. Features a 60Hz AMOLED screen, 16-day battery life, and over 150 sports modes. A massive upgrade from previous generations. Unbeatable direct-from-factory pricing on AliExpress.

name: 70mai Dash Cam M300
description: Protect your vehicle on Kenyan roads with 1296P HD recording, 3D noise reduction, and parking surveillance mode. 70mai is an award-winning Xiaomi ecosystem brand. Easily import this essential car gadget directly.

name: Baseus Blade 100W Power Bank (20000mAh)
description: Charge your MacBook or high-end laptop on the go! This ultra-slim 100W power bank packs 20,000mAh of capacity and features a digital display showing charging speed and remaining time. A must-have for remote workers.

name: Lenovo LP40 Pro Wireless Earbuds
description: Incredible value for money. These Bluetooth 5.1 wireless earbuds offer solid sound quality, decent battery life, and a comfortable fit for slightly over KSh 1,000. One of the top-selling audio products globally.
